claims.risk_if_overstated: Could be mistaken for a broad operational claim outside these fixtures.
claims.safe_public_wording: Six bounded local operational degradation scenarios were recorded and scored.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Mode leakage would invalidate the comparison.
claims.safe_public_wording: Baseline replay used visible-only inputs; pond-backed replay used recorded full-lineage inputs.

claims.risk_if_overstated: A baseline leak would invalidate visibility separation.
claims.safe_public_wording: MCP-seasoned refs were visible in pond-backed scenario outputs and absent from baseline outputs.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Should not be generalized outside the deterministic scenarios.
claims.safe_public_wording: Within these bounded scenarios, full-lineage replay preserved recovery structure more effectively than visible-only replay.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Hashes identify recorded runtime lineage; they do not imply external validation.
claims.safe_public_wording: Runtime hashes were recorded for the hard gate and pond-backed scenario consults.

claims.risk_if_overstated: This only covers the recorded file hash for this run.
claims.safe_public_wording: The reusable lineage pool hash was unchanged before and after this proof.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Promotion wording would exceed the proof boundary.
A broad claim would violate the hard-gate boundary.
claims.safe_public_wording: No global superiority claim is made.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Such wording is outside the proof.
